ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company's stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the resolution is associated with */,
  "resolution_number" TEXT /* Resolution number assigned by the company */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the resolution */,
  "resolution_text" TEXT /* Text of the resolution */,
  "link_to_proxy_statement" TEXT /* Link to the proxy statement */,
  "proposed_date" TEXT /* Date the resolution was proposed */,
  "resolution_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the resolution */,
  "resolution_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the resolution to track changes over time */,
  "proposer_name" TEXT /* Name of the proposer */,
  "proposer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the proposer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_resolution_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_status_id") REFERENCES resolution_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolution_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the status is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolution_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "status_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the status became effective */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES resolution_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_history_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., stakeholder, researcher, admin) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user is associated with */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resolution */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resolution was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolution_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, audit, survey) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "uploaded_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_documents_uploaded_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_documents_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolution_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_comments_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES resolution_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolution_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution the vote is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., approve, reject, abstain) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "voting_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_votes_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_votes_voting_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_session_id") REFERENCES voting_sessions ("voting_session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolution_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g., financial, operational, reputational) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date the impact was recorded */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Numerical score to quantify the impact */,
  "impact_source" TEXT /* Source of the impact data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_impact_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolution_stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution the stakeholder is involved in */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder (e.g., shareholder, board member, community leader) */,
  "stakeholder_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_type" TEXT /* Type of stakeholder (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "stakeholder_position" TEXT /* Position of the stakeholder in the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_stakeholders_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_sessions" (
  "voting_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting session */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution the voting session is for */,
  "voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the voting session */,
  "voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the voting session */,
  "voting_description" TEXT /* Description of the voting session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_sessions_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id")
)
